ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the university (e.g., public, private) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the university */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the university is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the university is located */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the university information was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the university information was created */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the university information was marked for deletion */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was founded */,
  "student_population" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  "faculty_population" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "campus_size" REAL /* Size of the campus in acres */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the university */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the university's logo */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the university */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the contact belongs to */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the contact person */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the contact person's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the contact person */,
  "last_contacted" TEXT /* Date and time when the contact person was last contacted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_contacts_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "degree_awarded" TEXT /* Degree awarded upon completion of the program */,
  "program_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for admission to the program */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Annual tuition fee for the program */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting applications */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_programs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the university (on a scale of 1 to 5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_type" TEXT /* Type of reviewer (e.g., student, alumni, faculty) */,
  "verified_review" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_ratings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)
